task_completion.description: OpenToonz is launched and the specified scene is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application window is open, and the 'dwanko_run' scene is visible in the Xsheet/Timeline or the main viewer.

task_completion.description: A background layer is added behind the character animation to replace transparency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column in the Xsheet, a new layer in the timeline, or a ColorCard FX node is added below/behind the main character animation levels.

task_completion.description: The background color is set to the requested Chroma Blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The color picker, palette, or FX settings window shows the background color set to RGB (0, 71, 171) or Hex #0047AB. The main viewer should show the character over a solid blue background.

task_completion.description: Render settings are configured for a PNG sequence and the correct output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' window is open, showing the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/chromakey_render/' and the file format set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: The animation is successfully rendered as a PNG sequence with at least 24 frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows a sequence of at least 24 PNG files (e.g., 0001.png to 0024.png) in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/chromakey_render/' directory, or an OpenToonz render progress bar is shown completing the sequence.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the OpenToonz GUI (e.g., clicking menus, adjusting output settings, using the color picker) rather than just running terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually rendered the sequence from OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render dialog/progress bar is visible, or the output settings are confirmed before the files appear in the output directory. The agent did not simply copy pre-existing images.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the scene file's code.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open and editing the 'dwanko_run.tnz' XML/text file directly to change background colors or render paths.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source scene: /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. Output directory: /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/chromakey_render. Target background color: RGB [0, 71, 171] (tolerance 30) or Hex #0047AB. The output must be a PNG sequence of at least 24 frames with no transparency, and the total file size must exceed 200 KB.
